PpgDex_2026-06-27_equiv.node-export.json.note_opticaldetector_2026_07_12: REGENERATED 2026-07-12 (PPGDEX-OPTICAL-DETECTOR-AND-SIGMA-REDERIVE-2026-07-11-BRIEF §1). detectBeats gained a WINDOWED-autocorrelation cadence prior driving an ADAPTIVE refractory (0.60 x the local beat, floored at the old 0.30 s). TERMA is a bare maPeak>maBeat with NO amplitude discrimination, so a prominent DIASTOLIC (reflected) wave raises its own block and was counted as a second beat ~half a cycle after systole — at the corpus sleeping 48 bpm that is ~625 ms, TWICE the fixed 0.30 s refractory, so the optical HR read exactly 2x true on 4 of 17 real trio nights (on three of them ALL THREE LEDs doubled together, so the 2-of-3 consensus vote ratified the harmonic and no cross-channel check could see it). A dicrotic notch is a HARMONIC, so the ACF fundamental is immune; the cadence is used ONLY to size the refractory, NOT to gate detection — gating on a WHOLE-RECORD autocorrelation period was the retired detector missed-beat root cause, and this cadence is windowed (it tracks HR drift + arousals). This CHANGES the corrected NN beat series: recording.contentId moved 7e887548f693->2c3b67527577, outputHash 69131ebdfe4d8ff1->eeaeb3ee20fe7764. REGENERATED by re-running PpgDex.compute({text}) on the committed uploads/Polar_Sense_BBBBBBBB_20260621_060523_PPG.txt (inputHashes UNCHANGED — the input is untouched); never hand-edited. Validated against the paired chest-ECG corner on all 17 concurrent trio nights: 17/17 HR-clean, 4 nights recovered (06-29 100->50 vs ECG 49.7 · 07-01 94->48 vs 48.0 · 07-02 106->48 vs 48.4 · 07-05 110->58 vs 57.8), 0 regressions. PpgDex re-bundled 971039596106->2a3306eaa6a3. GATE B asserts the producing bundle CURRENT manifestHash still equals 2a3306eaa6a3.

PpgDex_2026-06-27_equiv.node-export.json.note: ADDED 2026-06-27 (SIGNAL-ADAPTER-PHASE9-REMAINING-NODES — PpgDex leg, node 2 of 4) — PpgDex's FIRST code-gated fixture + the input for the Phase-9 'compute() ≡ committed export' equivalence gate (env.equiv.ppgdex). Produced by running the current PpgDex DSP (the code bundled into PpgDex.html, manifestHash c7c808bbb6a1) headless via PpgDex.compute({text}) on the committed real Polar Verity Sense uploads/Polar_Sense_BBBBBBBB_20260621_060523_PPG.txt (~6.5 min @176 Hz, 68638 optical samples → channel-SNR selection → optical beat detection → self-PPI → 2× 5-min HRV epochs) → this ganglior.node-export (recording.source 'ppg', startEpochMs 1782021923891, sessions 1, events 0 — the short clip has no between-epoch hrv_drop/autonomic_surge crossing, like the PulseDex/OxyDex equiv cases; event-byte coverage tracked in the PpgDex follow-ups brief). This IS the app's exportGanglior shape — ppgdex-app.js exportGanglior delegates to the SAME ppgBuildNodeExport for the single-session case, so the fixture is byte-identical to PpgDex.html's own export (the headless compute() leaves schema.generated/provenance/kernel as volatile metadata, which the gate's EXCL strips). Fully regenerate-able: re-run PpgDex.compute({text}) on the committed *_PPG.txt; the equivalence-gate diff (excludes generated/provenance/kernel/vo2est/karv) reproduces it with 0 differing fields. GATE B asserts the producing bundle's CURRENT manifestHash still equals c7c808bbb6a1 — turns red the moment PpgDex code changes. Produced BY the current gate-clean PpgDex bundle (the Phase-9 re-bundle).

synthetic_ppgdex_golden.node-export.json.note: ADDED 2026-07-12 (CPAP-REAL-CORPUS-2026-07-11-BRIEF §P9, resolving §M5) — a COMMITTED, content-addressed equivalence input for PpgDex. Before P9, every node's equivalence input was a REAL recording, hence gitignored, hence absent on a fresh clone: ALL EIGHT compute()-equivalence legs SKIPPED in CI. The suite's strongest correctness gate — the GATE-C surface that catches a code change which moved a fixture's OUTPUT — therefore ran only on the maintainer's machine, and a regression that moved an export would have gone green through CI. This input is SYNTHETIC (tools/make-synthetic-inputs.mjs): the vendor FORMAT is reproduced exactly, the DATA never is — closed-form, physiologically plausible waveforms containing no recording of any person and no device identifier. Deterministic (no RNG, no Date.now()), so re-running the generator reproduces it byte-for-byte and inputHashes stay stable. It ADDS to the real-recording leg (which still runs locally and exercises genuine vendor quirks); it does not replace it. REGENERATE the input and this golden together whenever the export shape changes.
